sqlMap.update: UPDATE dst_revision SET nombre = #nombre# WHERE id_revision = #id_revision#
sqlMap.select: select nextvalue('DSS_REVISION') as id from dual
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO dst_revision(id_revision, id_proceso, nombre, id_revision_siguiente) VALUES(#id_revision#, #id_proceso#, #nombre#, #id_revision_siguiente#)
sqlMap.update: update dst_revision set id_revision_siguiente = #id_revision_siguiente# where id_revision = #id_revision#
sqlMap.select: select id_revision from dst_revision where id_proceso = #id_proceso# and id_revision not in (select rr.id_revision_siguiente from dst_revision rr where rr.id_proceso = #id_proceso# and rr.id_revision_siguiente is not null)
select id_revision from dst_revision where id_revision_siguiente = #id_revision#
select id_revision_siguiente from dst_revision where id_revision = #id_revision#
sqlMap.sql:
select rn.id_proceso, rn.id_revision, rn.id_revision_siguiente, rn.nombre, count(c.id_carga) total_cargas from dst_revision_revisor rr, dst_revision rn, dst_revisor rv, dst_proceso pr, dst_carga c where rv.id_usuario = #id_usuario# and rv.id_persona = #id_persona#
and pr.id_proceso = #id_proceso#
and rn.id_proceso = pr.id_proceso and c.id_usuario = rv.id_usuario and c.id_revision = rn.id_revision and c.estado = 'V' and ( (pr.id_proceso = c.id_proceso and pr.id_negocio = #id_negocio# and rn.id_revision = rr.id_revision and rr.id_revisor = rv.id_revisor ) or (pr.id_usuario is null and pr.id_negocio is null) )
group by rn.id_proceso, rn.id_revision, rn.id_revision_siguiente, rn.nombre
sqlMap.update: update dst_carga set estado = 'L' where estado = 'V' and id_revision = #id_revision#
update dst_carga set id_revision = #id_siguiente_revision# where estado = 'V' and id_revision = #id_revision#
